description: Style Note Beautiful ethnic sets, intricately designed and with finesse in the finish, this will set of your outfit nicely and complete your ethnic ensembles. Product Detailsjewellery setnecklace: Reversible necklace, has cut glass set in a golden background leaf design on one side, green and red inlays on a cream background on the other side, has a closed chain with a multi coloured bead tassel at the back, has a movable bead to adjust length of the necklace and a pendant with a tear drop shaped green stone at the endEarring: Golden coloured base earring with cut glass leaf detail, has a dangling green coloured stone with a white stone on it and a push back closureMaterial and CareMetalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength of the necklace: 20 cmLength of the earring: 50 mm
